name: Rich Telegram Reply
description: Reply in Telegram with text, images, and useful actions while keeping the conversation connected.
whenToUse: Use this when you want to reply in Telegram with text, images, and useful actions while keeping the conversation connected.
Best for customer and operations teams that want repeatable work without changing the tools they already use.

stages.title: Read Origin Context
stages.summary: Inspect the request metadata, communication profile guidance, and thread context.

stages.title: Compose Response Payload
stages.summary: Decide exact text, image refs, and optional button payloads without embedding secrets.

stages.title: Send Telegram Response
stages.summary: Execute the explicit Telegram send action granted by the plan.
